title: Adversarial  Examples against Signature Verification
subtitle: Black-box adversarial ML research, 2019
summary: A summer research on region-restricted black-box attacks against handwritten signature verification that later became a Pattern Recognition paper. I really only spent two weeks on foestering the major algorithms, but it worked and eventually got published.

blocks.text: The work started from a course interest in adversarial examples. It focused on keeping perturbations inside the stroke region, so they stayed hard to notice and survived background cleaning.
You can find the paper here:

blocks.label: Black-box attack against handwritten signature verification with region-restricted adversarial perturbations
